mapper.select: SELECT c.COMMENT_ID, c.COMMENT_CONTENT, DATE_FORMAT(c.COMMENT_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS COMMENT_REGDATE, c.BOARD_ID, c.MEMBER_ID, m.MEMBER_LOGINID FROM COMMENT c JOIN MEMBER m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE c.BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY c.COMMENT_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENT(COMMENT_CONTENT, BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID) VALUES(#{commentContent}, #{boardId}, #{memberId})
